MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GLEN NAVIS, Esq. of G&B Law, LLP (Tel: 818-382-6200) for petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC;
MALAYSIA WALLACE, payee.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed. Matter submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Petitioner's petition for approval of transfer of payment rights is granted.

Order signed.
